content:
@**Rick Gleason I have started a basics manual in asciidoc.

I don't like names for images so I am using numerical notation e.g. 2.1.jpg
The manual should use minimal text, making it easy to translate to other languages
Uses a free American chart for demonstration
Uses Globalsat BU-353S4 as an example of a GPS
When I have a rough draft I will put the manual on my website for review.
This topic was moved here from #general > Basic Manual by Alec Leamas.
